testcase.name: test_cancel_processing_then_not_overwritten
testcase.failure: tests/test_eduscanner_cancel_delete.py:38: in test_cancel_processing_then_not_overwritten doc = _upload_pdf(auth_client, sample_pdf) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tests/test_eduscanner_cancel_delete.py:30: in _upload_pdf assert r.status_code == 200, r.text E AssertionError: {"detail":"Sesi tidak valid"} E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code
